name: FlightRadarAPI
description: SDK for Python and Node.js to retrieve real-time data about flights, aircraft and airports from Flightradar24.

name: PyMemoryEditor
description: Python library built with ctypes that lets you inspect, modify and search the memory of any running process in a few lines of Python.

name: DokkuWeb
description: A web application that serves as a dashboard interface for managing apps and resources on a Dokku platform.

name: Dokku-API
description: A REST API for managing applications and resources on a Dokku platform.

name: Autocomplete Suggestions
description: Full-stack search demo with real-time autocomplete: relevant suggestions appear as the user types, powered by Elasticsearch.

name: FastSnake CLI
description: A Python CLI, published on PyPI, with tooling that helps competitive programmers develop and test solutions during contests.

name: Virtual Assistant
description: A voice-driven virtual assistant that can search the web, open websites and launch programs using speech recognition.

name: Kivy Chat
description: A Kivy application that uses raw sockets to spin up a server and chat with friends over TCP/IP.
